name: Richard Simmons' Banana Pananacake
recipeIngredient: Very ripe banana (1, sliced very thinly)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the whole wheat flour, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and ground clove until well combined.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together the egg, oil, honey, milk, and vanilla extract.
4. Slice the ripe banana into quarters lengthwise and then horizontally into very thin pieces.
5. Add the wet ingredients to the well of the flour mixture.
6. Stir until well blended. If needed, add a little more milk to achieve a pourable consistency.
7. Pour the batter into a preheated nonstick Teflon pan to make silver dollar-sized pancakes.
8. Cook the pancakes and serve.
